title: {{TITLE}}
content: # {{TITLE}} ## Client Issue Description [Provide a concise description of what the agency reported. Include timeline, frequency, and any relevant background context.] **Example:** The agency reported intermittent random camera activations occurring across multiple vehicles following initial installation. --- ## Observed Symptoms [Describe what was confirmed during inspection, testing, or log review.] - [Symptom 1] - [Symptom 2] - [Engineering log findings] - [Replication details if applicable] **Example:** - Fleet hub entering boot loop - Voltage detected on partition - Activation occurring under full equipment load --- ## Root Cause [Clearly identify the validated root cause. Keep this factual and evidence-based.] **Example:** Testing confirmed that upfitter-installed wiring was under-gauge and not rated to support the electrical load of Fleet 3 equipment, resulting in ground saturation and electrical backfeeding. --- ## Resolution Performed [Document exactly what was done.] - [Corrective action 1] - [Corrective action 2] - [Rewiring, relay installation, isolation, firmware updates, etc.] - [Validation testing performed] **Example:** - Re-routed ground to appropriate chassis location - Added relays to trigger inputs - Re-routed power and ground directly to battery - Verified system stability through road testing --- ## Prevention / Education Provided [Explain what guidance was given to prevent recurrence.] - [Best practice workflow] - [Power / grounding requirements] - [Upfitter coordination recommendations] - [Monitoring recommendations] **Example:** The agency was advised to ensure all Axon equipment receives dedicated battery power and properly rated grounding, and to avoid sharing under-gauge circuits with third-party devices. --- If additional assistance is needed or further validation is required, please let us know. We appreciate the opportunity to support your agency.
